sn45.31:1.1:
1
Sāvatthinidānaṁ. "Micchāpaṭipattiñca vo, bhikkhave, desessāmi, sammāpaṭipattiñca. Taṁ suṇātha.
sn45.31:1.2: Katamā ca, bhikkhave, micchāpaṭipatti? Seyyathidaṁ – micchādiṭṭhi … pe … micchāsamādhi. Ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, micchāpaṭipatti.
sn45.31:1.3: Katamā ca, bhikkhave, sammāpaṭipatti? Seyyathidaṁ – sammādiṭṭhi … pe … sammāsamādhi. Ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, sammāpaṭipattī"ti.
